Revenue grew 33.08% to $56.31 billion, advertising surged 33% year-over-year, and CEO Mark Zuckerberg told investors “We’re on track to deliver personal superintelligence to billions of people.” Yet shares are down 7.47% year-to-date and sit at $610.26. The question I want to ... Can Meta Stock Reach $1,500 by 2030?

headline: NVIDIA Infineon Power Partnership Puts Data Center Story In New Focus
summary: Nvidia and Infineon are partnering to introduce an 800V DC power architecture into Nvidia's MGX AI Factory ecosystem. This extension of the MGX ecosystem focuses on power delivery, not just compute hardware, and is positioned for large scale AI workloads.
